stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding a pilot's ability to modify terminal route information from the navigation database during PBN operations?

options.a: The pilot is never allowed to modify terminal route information.
options.b: Terminal route information can only be modified through the AIRAC cycle.
options.c: The pilot can only modify terminal route information when flying in uncontrolled airspace.
options.d: The pilot can only modify terminal route information on receipt of an ATC clearance.
